mapper.insert: INSERT INTO pipeline_job (pipeline_definition_id, job_name, job_type, execution_order, preset_id, config_json, jenkins_script, jenkins_status, created_at) VALUES (NULL, #{jobName}, #{jobType}, NULL, #{presetId}, #{configJson}, #{jenkinsScript}, COALESCE(#{jenkinsStatus}, 'PENDING'), NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT pj.id , pj.pipeline_definition_id , pj.job_name , pj.job_type , pj.execution_order , pj.preset_id , mp.name AS preset_name , pj.config_json , pj.jenkins_script , pj.jenkins_status , pj.created_at FROM pipeline_job pj LEFT JOIN middleware_preset mp ON mp.id = pj.preset_id WHERE pj.id = #{id}

SELECT pj.id , pj.pipeline_definition_id , pj.job_name , pj.job_type , pj.execution_order , pj.preset_id , mp.name AS preset_name , pj.config_json , pj.jenkins_script , pj.jenkins_status , pj.created_at FROM pipeline_job pj LEFT JOIN middleware_preset mp ON mp.id = pj.preset_id ORDER BY pj.created_at DESC

SELECT pj.id , pj.pipeline_definition_id , pj.job_name , pj.job_type , pj.execution_order , pj.preset_id , mp.name AS preset_name , pj.config_json , pj.jenkins_script , pj.jenkins_status , pj.created_at FROM pipeline_job pj LEFT JOIN middleware_preset mp ON mp.id = pj.preset_id WHERE pj.id IN
#{id}

SELECT pj.id , pj.pipeline_definition_id , pj.job_name , pj.job_type , pj.execution_order , pj.preset_id , mp.name AS preset_name , pj.config_json , pj.jenkins_script , pj.jenkins_status , pj.created_at FROM pipeline_job pj LEFT JOIN middleware_preset mp ON mp.id = pj.preset_id WHERE pj.jenkins_status = #{jenkinsStatus}
